while True: self.bfs(s) if self.depth[t] < 0: return flow self.progress = [0] * self.n current_flow = self.dfs(s, t, float('inf')) while current_flow > 0: flow += current_flow current_flow = self.dfs(s, t, float('inf'))

for i in range(N): mf.add_link(0, i+1, 1) mf.add_link(i+N+1, 2*N+1, 1)

for j in range(N): if rl[i][0] < bl[j][0] and rl[i][1] < bl[j][1]: mf.add_link(i+1, j+N+1, 1)
